Name: UAssetManagerSettings
Description: Settings for the Asset Management framework, which can be used to discover, load, and audit game-specific asset types

Variables.Name: PrimaryAssetTypesToScan
Variables.Description: List of asset types to scan at startup

Variables.Name: DirectoriesToExclude
Variables.Description: List of directories to exclude from scanning for Primary Assets, useful to exclude test assets

Variables.Name: PrimaryAssetRules
Variables.Description: List of specific asset rule overrides

Variables.Name: bOnlyCookProductionAssets
Variables.Description: If true, DevelopmentCook assets will error when they are cooked

Variables.Name: bShouldGuessTypeAndNameInEditor
Variables.Description: If true, PrimaryAsset TypeName will be implied for assets in the editor (cooked builds always must be explicit). This allows guessing for content that hasn't been resaved yet

Variables.Name: bShouldAcquireMissingChunksOnLoad
Variables.Description: If true, this will query the platform chunk install interface to request missing chunks for any requested primary asset loads

Variables.Name: MetaDataTagsForAssetRegistry
Variables.Description: The metadata tags to be transferred to the Asset Registry.

Variables.Name: BlacklistFilePath
Variables.Description: 编辑器检查用黑名单文件路径.

Variables.Name: BlacklistForPackageFilePath
Variables.Description: 打包用黑名单文件路径.

Variables.Name: bAlwaysReloadCSVConfig
Variables.Description: 是否每次检查都重新读取黑名单配置.

Variables.Name: bUseBlacklistMap
Variables.Description: 构造所有黑名单文件夹的文件Map来查找.

Variables.Name: bEnableCheckBlacklist
Variables.Description: Whether check the asset depend on blacklist asset in content browser.

Variables.Name: SearchingDepth
Variables.Description: The depth of searching blacklist asset tree in content browser.
